description: Pre-dawn glow — sun just below horizon, blue-pink sky gradient, volumetric god-rays over ruin pillars

sun.notes: Sun below horizon — indirect scatter only, no direct illumination yet

fog.emotional_intent: Mystery and anticipation — the world holds its breath before first light

god_ray_light.label: Light_GodRay_RuinCenter
god_ray_light.purpose: God-ray shaft between Cretaceous pillars — dawn light piercing jungle canopy

cave_entrance_glow.label: Light_CaveEntrance_AmbientGlow
cave_entrance_glow.purpose: Cool blue ambient inside cave entrance — deeper darkness than surrounding jungle

shadow_deepener.label: Light_RuinShadow_AmbientDarken
shadow_deepener.purpose: Deepen ambient shadow in ruin area vs surrounding jungle — creates visual contrast

fill_lights.label: Light_Dawn_EastRose
fill_lights.purpose: Rose-gold eastern horizon glow — dawn breaking from east

fill_lights.label: Light_Dawn_WestCool
fill_lights.purpose: Cool blue western sky — still night on western horizon

fill_lights.label: Light_Dawn_ZenithBlue
fill_lights.purpose: Deep indigo zenith — overhead sky still dark before sunrise

emotional_intent.director_note: Dawn is the most dangerous time in the prehistoric world. Predators are active at first light. The ruins loom in pre-dawn mist — ancient, indifferent, beautiful. The player feels small.
emotional_intent.cinematography_reference: Roger Deakins — Sicario dawn desert sequence. Light as threat, not comfort.
emotional_intent.mood: Tense anticipation, primal alertness, ancient mystery

day_night_cycle_position.cycle_progression: Night → Dawn → Sunrise → Morning → Midday → Afternoon → Dusk → Night

handoff_to_agent9.notes: Dawn palette fully configured. Character artist should ensure player character materials respond correctly to Lumen GI — skin should catch dawn rose-gold from east fill light.
